violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Dishes and utensils were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Eggplant parm, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Eggplant parm was observed at 56 DF at the time of inspection and was voluntarily disposed of. Proper cooling methods reviewed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The dishwasher door located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The overflow from the coffee machine is draining into the hand sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

The handle located on the 1 door cooler in the dining room area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. The Gasket located on the one door cooler in the dining room area was in poor repair. Gaskets must me maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
The over flow from the coffee machine is draining into the hand sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
